channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-08 22:16 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Super Heavy booster is pure engineering art
item.description: Super Heavy booster is pure engineering art

item.title: @elonmusk: Gemini was the fastest-growing Gen AI tool in year-over-year website visits in February 2026.
item.description: Gemini was the fastest-growing Gen AI tool in year-over-year website visits in February 2026.

item.title: @elonmusk: China is rapidly reducing dependence on oil
item.description: China is rapidly reducing dependence on oil

item.title: @elonmusk: Incidentally this is why I like@xai’s mission to “understand the universe”. I want AI to make us sup...
item.description: Incidentally this is why I like@xai’s mission to “understand the universe”. I want AI to make us super geniuses not super idiots 😂

item.title: @elonmusk: Look at Grok growing closely behind Google without the advantage of having the entire Google and And...
item.description: Look at Grok growing closely behind Google without the advantage of having the entire Google and Android ecosystem to lean on. That is quite the accomplishment.

item.title: @elonmusk: it’s truly fascinating how some behavior is genetic thankfully this doesn’t happen in humans! imagin...
item.description: it’s truly fascinating how some behavior is genetic thankfully this doesn’t happen in humans! imagine the arguments otherwise! haha

item.title: @elonmusk: The lunatic left that took over Twitter was Wormtongue to the World. Firing@Jackwas the final straw....
item.description: The lunatic left that took over Twitter was Wormtongue to the World. Firing@Jackwas the final straw. He was the last bulwark. Now Bret Taylor is chair of@OpenAI…

item.title: @elonmusk: MUST-SEE: President of El Salvador Nayib Bukele - "What about the human right of the women who don't...
item.description: MUST-SEE: President of El Salvador Nayib Bukele - "What about the human right of the women who don't want to be r*ped? What about the human right of kids to play, or to be free?" "But no, they were worried about the human rights of the k*llers."

item.title: @elonmusk: We are going to get back to the Moon with this increased launch cadence backed by an unprecedented l...
item.description: We are going to get back to the Moon with this increased launch cadence backed by an unprecedented level of support from all of our stakeholders.

item.title: @elonmusk: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
item.description: Only Grok speaks the truth. Only truthful AI is safe. Only truth understands the universe.
